label: Instant Free Triage
text: Free AI pet health triage — get answers in 30 seconds, no sign-up required. Stop doom-scrolling pet forums at midnight. CheckPet gives you veterinary-grade answers instantly.

label: Active SMS Monitoring
text: We don't just diagnose, we monitor. CheckPet sends you an automated SMS check-in 2 hours after triage to see if your pet is better or worse — and escalates if needed.

label: Veterinary-Grade Trust
text: Answers grounded in the Merck Veterinary Manual, not Reddit threads. Real veterinary science, not internet opinions. CheckPet uses RAG technology to reference trusted protocols.

label: Late Night Emergency Decision
text: It's 11 PM and your dog just ate something weird. Is it an ER trip or can you wait until morning? Know for sure in 30 seconds with CheckPet — the free pet health triage tool.

label: OnStar for Pet Health
text: CheckPet is the OnStar for pet health. Not just a symptom checker — an active guardian that triages emergencies instantly and stays with you to monitor recovery via SMS.

label: Save on Unnecessary ER Visits
text: Save the ER trip for real emergencies. CheckPet is 100% free and tells you whether your pet needs immediate care or if you can safely monitor at home. No more $500 panic visits.
